Label: Calling Required
Calling Required Meaning: This is a payer error. Call and ask them to reprocess the claim manually. Before this make everything Handy.
Calling Required Line 1: Have the original claim number, denial date, and corrected claim number ready.
Calling Required Line 2: Bring proof: NDC-to-HCPCS match, drug administration record, and the EOB.
Calling Required Line 3: Write down the rep's name, call reference number, and promised action.
